units.content: cyclic subgraph's spectral-radius metric meets or exceeds the predetermined threshold
counterfactual generator receives a set of historical action records comprising the cyclic subgraph
gradient value computed as partial derivative of spectral-radius metric with respect to parameters of each historical action record
gradient value obtained via adjoint computation traversing the cyclic subgraph
perturbation set selected as those action records with largest absolute gradient magnitude, capped at predetermined maximum number
one or more counterfactual histories constructed by replacing each perturbation-set action record with an alternative action record
counterfactual histories ranked by reduction in spectral-radius metric when substituted for actual history
